SEARCH
Package client.net

Class ClientConnection

java.lang.Object
client.net.ClientConnection
public class ClientConnection extends Object
Persistent TCP connection to the GoNature server with async request/response correlation and unsolicited-event support.

Lifecycle:

  1. construct ClientConnection(host, port)
  2. connect() — opens the socket, the object streams, and starts the reader thread
  3. sendRequest(ClientRequest) — many times, from any number of worker threads, multiplexed over the same socket
  4. close() — on application shutdown

Threading model. Exactly one reader thread reads in; the input stream is never synchronized because only one thread touches it. Outbound writes go through synchronized (out) so multiple worker threads can call sendRequest concurrently without garbling the wire — every writeObject + flush + reset is atomic with respect to any other write. The reader thread routes inbound ServerResponses to the originating caller via a per-request CompletableFuture keyed on correlationId, and forwards ServerEvents to EventBus.dispatch(ServerEvent).

Must not be called from the JavaFX Application thread. sendRequest(ClientRequest) blocks for up to ten seconds on the per-request future; if the FX thread invokes it the UI freezes. All sends go through NetworkService, which already runs them on a worker thread.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final class 
    ClientConnection.ConnectionClosedException
    Surfaces a connection drop to any thread waiting in sendRequest(ClientRequest) as a typed IOException so callers can distinguish it from generic stream failures.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private static final int
    CONNECT_TIMEOUT_MS
    Socket connect timeout, in milliseconds.
    private final AtomicLong
    correlationCounter
    Allocates correlation ids (starts at 1; 0 is the unset sentinel).
    private final String
    host
    Server host to connect to.
    private ObjectInputStream
    in
    Object input stream, read by the reader thread.
    private ObjectOutputStream
    out
    Object output stream (writes are serialized on its monitor).
    private final ConcurrentHashMap<Long,CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>>
    pending
    In-flight requests keyed by correlation id, completed by the reader thread.
    private final int
    port
    Server port to connect to.
    private Thread
    readerThread
    The background reader thread.
    private static final long
    REQUEST_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
    How long sendRequest(ClientRequest) waits for a reply, in seconds.
    private boolean
    shuttingDown
    Set during close() so the reader loop exits cleanly.
    private Socket
    socket
    The TCP socket (volatile: shared across reader/sender/close threads).

    Description
    ClientConnection(String host, int port)
    Creates an unconnected client connection; call connect() to open it.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    close()
    Closes the connection and shuts the reader thread down cleanly.
    void
    connect()
    Opens the socket and the object streams, then spawns the reader thread.
    private boolean
    isClosed()
    Returns whether the socket is unset or closed.
    boolean
    isConnected()
    Returns true if the underlying socket is connected and not closed.
    private void
    readLoop()
    Reader-thread loop: reads inbound objects until shutdown/disconnect, routing ServerResponses to their pending future and ServerEvents to the EventBus.
    ServerResponse
    sendRequest(ClientRequest req)
    Sends a request and blocks the caller's thread until the matching response arrives, the request times out, or the connection drops.

      Socket connect timeout, in milliseconds.

    • host

      private final String host
      Server host to connect to.

    • port

      private final int port
      Server port to connect to.

    • socket

      private volatile Socket socket
      The TCP socket (volatile: shared across reader/sender/close threads).

    • out

      private volatile ObjectOutputStream out
      Object output stream (writes are serialized on its monitor).

    • in

      private volatile ObjectInputStream in
      Object input stream, read by the reader thread.

    • correlationCounter

      private final AtomicLong correlationCounter
      Allocates correlation ids (starts at 1; 0 is the unset sentinel).

    • pending

      private final ConcurrentHashMap<Long,CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>> pending
      In-flight requests keyed by correlation id, completed by the reader thread.

    • readerThread

      private volatile Thread readerThread
      The background reader thread.

    • shuttingDown

      private volatile boolean shuttingDown
      Set during close() so the reader loop exits cleanly.

  • Constructor Details

    • ClientConnection

      public ClientConnection(String host, int port)
      Creates an unconnected client connection; call connect() to open it.
      Parameters:
      host - the server host to connect to
      port - the server port to connect to

  • Method Details

    • connect

      public void connect() throws IOException
      Opens the socket and the object streams, then spawns the reader thread. Throws if the connect handshake fails.
      Throws:
      IOException - if the TCP connect or stream-header exchange fails

    • isConnected

      public boolean isConnected()
      Returns true if the underlying socket is connected and not closed.
      Returns:
      true if the underlying socket is connected and not closed

    • sendRequest

      public ServerResponse sendRequest(ClientRequest req) throws IOException
      Sends a request and blocks the caller's thread until the matching response arrives, the request times out, or the connection drops.

      The caller's thread MUST NOT be the JavaFX Application thread; see the class-level javadoc for why.

      Parameters:
      req - the request to send (its correlation id is assigned by this method)
      Returns:
      the matching ServerResponse
      Throws:
      IOException - on timeout, interrupt, send failure, or connection close

    • readLoop

      private void readLoop()
      Reader-thread loop: reads inbound objects until shutdown/disconnect, routing ServerResponses to their pending future and ServerEvents to the EventBus.

    • isClosed

      private boolean isClosed()
      Returns whether the socket is unset or closed.
      Returns:
      whether the socket is unset or closed

    • close

      public void close()
      Closes the connection and shuts the reader thread down cleanly. Pending futures are completed exceptionally with ClientConnection.ConnectionClosedException inside the reader thread's finally block, so any thread parked on sendRequest(ClientRequest) unblocks immediately.
